scenarios.label: Green low-risk Helm change
scenarios.description: Fresh namespace-scoped Helm update with complete evidence and high rollback confidence.

scenarios.label: Amber PVC/RBAC approval
scenarios.description: Storage and Role changes require a bounded human approval.

scenarios.label: Red cluster-scope and Secret
scenarios.description: Forbidden cluster-scope mutation and Secret data block execution.

scenarios.label: Generating twin
scenarios.description: Progressive evidence availability before a final decision.

scenarios.label: Stale live snapshot
scenarios.description: Evidence freshness is outside the configured window.

scenarios.label: Material drift
scenarios.description: Live drift invalidates the previous execution decision.

scenarios.label: Superseded decision
scenarios.description: A newer decision version replaces historical evidence.

scenarios.label: Missing MoP replay
scenarios.description: Optional replay evidence is explicitly Not Run.

scenarios.label: Missing runtime history
scenarios.description: Historical runtime evidence is Not Available.

twins.recommended_action: Proceed through the normal Bundle Execution approval controls.

top_reasons.summary: The authoritative dry-run accepted every operation.

actions.label: Request Approval
actions.disabled_reason: Approval is available only for a fresh Amber decision.

twins.recommended_action: Review PVC and namespace Role findings, then request approval.

top_reasons.summary: The storage class changes from standard to fast-rwo.
A namespace Role adds the watch verb.

actions.label: Open Execution
actions.disabled_reason: No Bundle Execution is linked to this decision.

twins.recommended_action: Remove cluster-scoped mutation and Secret data, then generate a new bundle.

top_reasons.summary: ClusterRole creation is outside the configured ODD.
An unredacted Secret data pattern was detected.

actions.label: Open Execution
actions.disabled_reason: No Bundle Execution is linked to this decision.

actions.label: Request Approval
actions.disabled_reason: Approval is available only for a fresh Amber decision.

actions.disabled_reason: A final decision report is not available.

actions.disabled_reason: No Bundle Execution is linked to this decision.

actions.disabled_reason: Approval is available only for a fresh Amber decision.

overview.title: Overview
overview.summary: Deterministic release decision across policy, evidence, dry-run fidelity, rollback, freshness, and drift.

reasons.title: PVC storage class change
reasons.detail: Two stateful resources require a confirmed migration window.

reasons.title: RBAC Role expansion
reasons.detail: Three verbs are added inside the target namespace only.

reasons.title: Medium rollback confidence
reasons.detail: Data restore has not been rehearsed.

release-delta.title: Release Delta Twin
release-delta.summary: Structured resource differences between the observed release and the proposed bundle.

dependency-graph.title: Dependency Graph Twin
dependency-graph.summary: Namespace-scoped topology with declared and evidence-backed relationships.

policy.title: Policy Twin
policy.summary: Deterministic policy findings inside the configured ODD.

findings.title: PVC class change
findings.detail: Storage migration confirmation is required.

findings.title: Role verb expansion
findings.detail: The watch verb is added inside agent-testing.

findings.title: Replica increase
findings.detail: Capacity acknowledgment is required above two replicas.

dry-run.title: Dry-run / Diff Twin
dry-run.summary: Authoritative MoP Execution Agent dry-run evidence. No second simulation path is used.

rollback.title: Rollback Twin
rollback.summary: Rollback confidence is evaluated separately from release risk.
steps: Freeze traffic changes.
Run Helm rollback to revision 7.
Restore workload scale to two replicas.
Retain PVCs; data restoration remains separately approved.

drift.title: Drift Twin
drift.summary: Latest allowed live snapshot compared with decision evidence.

mop-replay.title: MoP Replay Twin
mop-replay.summary: No compatible historical execution exists for this bundle lineage and target topology.
mop-replay.reason: Optional replay evidence is explicitly Not Run and does not fail the decision.

runtime-behavior.title: Runtime Behavior Twin
runtime-behavior.summary: Rules-first historical signals; model text cannot assign risk or eligibility.

release-note-validation.title: Release Note Validation Twin
release-note-validation.summary: No release-note artifact is linked to this bundle checksum.
release-note-validation.reason: Bundle evidence remains available; release-note validation is optional.

audit.title: Audit Timeline
audit.summary: Safe event summaries, contract versions, actor identity, and evidence hashes.
